control_character_policy: remove zero-width; normalize Unicode spaces and CRLF
lowercase_policy: ASCII letters are lowercased identically for documents and queries
numeric_policy: retain numbers and protect fiscal year, article, page, money, and model identifiers
punctuation_policy: drop standalone symbols; retain protected internal hyphen and slash
pos_policy: content_lemma: nouns/proper nouns/sahen nouns plus verb/adjective lemma; OOV surface
lemma_policy: noun surface; verb/adjective lemma; Sudachi uses normalized_form consistently
document_query_consistency: legacy_lsa loads the saved profile and applies the same normalize/tokenize path; make_ce_direct transforms raw text and raw query through the same saved vectorizer
